msg: warning: Variable n is a dead store!
reasoning: Line 41 is 'int n = *cache;' inside the loop body of init_node_lock_keys(). After this assignment the loop body ends and n is never read — a genuine dead store. The presence condition [def(CONFIG_LOCKDEP)] is correctly constrained: this code only exists in the #ifdef CONFIG_LOCKDEP branch. The vbdb entry for this file (0f8f809) documents an OutOfBoundsRead (kmalloc_caches accessed with an overly wide loop bound), not this dead-store issue. New true positive, correctly constrained.
